description: Cardiac monitoring heuristic overrides — ECG analysis, rhythm classification, interval measurements

patterns.proposed_hazard: Ventricular arrhythmia classification may be incorrect
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Misclassified rhythm — VTach/VFib not detected or false positive
Missed asystole — no-rhythm state not detected

patterns.proposed_hazard: QRS duration threshold may be incorrect
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Incorrect QRS width boundary — wide complex tachycardia missed
patterns.proposed_harm: Misclassification of ventricular vs supraventricular rhythm

patterns.proposed_hazard: PR interval threshold may be incorrect
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Incorrect PR interval boundary — heart block not detected

patterns.proposed_hazard: QT interval threshold may be incorrect
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Incorrect QT/QTc boundary — long QT not flagged
patterns.proposed_harm: Undetected risk of torsades de pointes

patterns.proposed_hazard: ST segment analysis may be incorrect
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Missed ST elevation/depression — ischemia not detected

patterns.proposed_hazard: Rhythm classification may produce incorrect output
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Incorrect rhythm classification — wrong arrhythmia type
patterns.proposed_harm: Inappropriate clinical response to misidentified rhythm

patterns.proposed_hazard: R-peak detection may fail or produce false peaks
patterns.proposed_failure_mode: Missed or phantom R-peaks — heart rate miscalculation
patterns.proposed_harm: Incorrect heart rate leads to wrong clinical assessment
